title: Montes Scripturarum: The Mounts Of The Scriptures.
content:
The mountains of the Scriptures are, some say,
    Moses, and Jesus, called Joshua:
    The prophets, mountains of the Old are meant,
    Th' apostles, mounts of the New Testament.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Montes Scripturarum: The Mounts Of The Scriptures."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
